nodes.title: 🎭 Extract Tyrone Voice Profile
widgets_values: Mama lost the house in oh-three. Wasn't no warnin'. Just a letter. Then a lock on the door. She went down south. Family in Louisiana said they had room. I stayed. Seventeen. Sleepin' in a Cutlass Supreme with a pit bull and a stolen laptop. Three years like that. Couches. Cars. Places nobody should be closin' they eyes. But that laptop... that changed somethin'. Library WiFi. Community center when they'd let me in. Started readin' things I wasn't suppose to understan'. Tax codes. Lien laws. How credit actually work. How bail bonds make money. Who own what in which neighborhood, and why. Same way some folk hear music — I started hearin' systems.

nodes.title: 💾 Save Tyrone Voice Profile
widgets_values: Mama lost the house in oh-three. Wasn't no warnin'. Just a letter. Then a lock on the door. She went down south. Family in Louisiana said they had room. I stayed.

nodes.title: 🎭 Tyrone Voice Clone — Test Line
widgets_values: Your job ain't to predict the end of the world. Your job is to be ready when the world don't show up the way you thought it would. That's the difference between preppers and survivors. Preppers buy stuff. Survivors build systems.

nodes.title: 🎨 Supporting Character — Neighbor (Voice Design)
widgets_values: You sure about that, man? Last time somebody round here tried to go off-grid, the city came through and condemned the whole block. I'm just sayin'... be careful who you tell.

A gruff older African American male voice, deep baritone, slightly raspy from years of smoking. Speaks slowly and deliberately with a Southern drawl. Skeptical but caring tone, like a concerned neighbor who has seen too much.

properties.text:
BOWTIE BULLIES VOICE PIPELINE
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

BRAND: BowTie Bullies (Survival/Preparedness)
NARRATOR: Tyrone — AAVE cadence, measured,
  deliberate. Uses ElevenLabs in production.
  This workflow is for Qwen3-TTS local testing
  and supporting character generation.

AAVE ORTHOGRAPHY RULES:
• g-drop: warnin', sleepin', closin', hearin'
• Demonstrative shift: they eyes, them nights
• Negative auxiliary: Ain't get, ain't never
• Subject drop: Seventeen. (not 'I was seventeen')
• Verb agreement: How credit actually work
• Lexical swap: folk (not people), outta (not out of)
• Target density: ~65%

TTS PARAMETERS (Moderate Set):
• temp: 0.80  • top_p: 0.92
• top_k: 60   • rep_penalty: 1.35

PAUSE TIMING:
• Anchor lines: 2000ms (I stayed.)
• Transitions: 600ms (standard beats)
• Emotional weight drives pause duration

REFERENCE: tyroneAAVE_originStory.mp3
(ElevenLabs clone source)

SUPPORTING CHARACTER VOICES
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Use VoiceDesign node for characters.
Describe voice in the 'instruct' field:

• Age, gender, ethnicity
• Vocal quality (raspy, smooth, nasal)
• Speaking pace (slow, measured, rapid)
• Accent/dialect if applicable
• Emotional register (skeptical, warm, tense)

Characters save ElevenLabs credits.
Tyrone ALWAYS uses ElevenLabs in production.

To add more characters:
1. Duplicate the VoiceDesign section
2. Change the instruct description
3. Change the text
4. Connect to new Save/Preview nodes

info.name: BowTie Bullies — Multi-Character Voice Pipeline
info.author: The Innovative Native
info.description: Dual voice pipeline for BowTie Bullies survival content. Tyrone (narrator) via voice cloning with AAVE orthography. Supporting characters via VoiceDesign. Parameters tuned from A/B testing.
